name: qa-planner
description: Portable QA planning plugin with Plane hybrid support for converting requirements and Plane work items/cards, comments, and readable attachments into planning_state JSON, test plans, test cases, coverage maps, Plane card/work-item sync outputs, review feedback, and downstream handoff contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Create QA plans from requirements or Plane cards.
interface.longDescription: QA Planner provides a portable skill for normalizing requirements, Plane.so work items/cards, comments, and readable attachments, analyzing risk and ambiguity without unsupported assumptions, creating planning_state JSON, rendering test plans and test cases from the Template Test Case field model, managing OK/NOK review loops, syncing Plane comments/attachments/wiki pages back to the source card/work item, asking required status-move clarification when Plane input omits status movement, optionally moving Plane status after successful sync, and producing handoff contracts for qa-executor, qa-automation, and qa-reporter.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-planner to create a QA planning package from requirements or a Plane work item.
